name: terrapin-tools
description: Simple tools for people who work — terrapin.tools

scripts.dev:start: launchctl unload ~/Library/LaunchAgents/tools.terrapin.agent.plist 2>/dev/null; npx nodemon --watch agent-server.js --watch tools.json agent-server.js
scripts.create-package: tar -czf agent-package.tar.gz agent-server.js mail-server.js mail-setup.js package.json tools.json tools/ index.html agent.html agent-setup.html dashboard.html setup-wizard.html privacy.html turtle-optimized.png update.sh
